title: 8. List of Permitted Food Additives with Other Accepted Uses (Lists of Permitted Food Additives) - Canada.ca
content:
## 8. List of Permitted Food Additives with Other Purposes of Use (Lists of Permitted Food Additives)
Supersedes: 2026-01-01 Date published: 2026-02-04
Access archived versions of this list.

(a) Good Manufacturing Practice. When sold as a cooked product, the meat contains a meat protein content of not less than 12%. When sold as an uncooked product, the meat contains a meat protein content of not less than 10%.
